## PR Description
Provide a quick overview of what you did. Keep it simple.

- Why is this PR needed?
- What are the main changes?
What issues does this fix? List them.

## Checklist
Make sure everything is done before requesting reviews:
- [ ] Your code compiles cleanly: run `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] All tests pass: run `bun test`
- [ ] Code is fully typed (no implicit any)
- [ ] If you added fields, they are whitelisted in `toJSON`
- No dead code. Clean up your console logs.

## Verification
What did you test? Describe it briefly.
Provide code snippets or screenshots if you updated builders or validation guards.
